message:
feat(config): add grpc_addr option for remote TCP listener

Add GRPCAddr field to DaemonConfig for optional TCP gRPC listener.
When empty (default), daemon only listens on Unix socket. When set
(e.g., ":65433"), daemon will also listen on TCP for remote connections.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
